title: orchis iberica var. longifolia
intro: Orchis iberica var. longifolia, also known as the Iberian orchid, is a rare and endangered species of orchid found in the Iberian Peninsula and parts of Eastern Europe. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Orchis iberica var. longifolia include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce blood pressure, and act as an anti-aging agent due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture, and it can also be used in herbal teas and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
